title: Peruvians promised jobs in Russia, but landed on the front lines in Ukraine
abstract: Imagine being promised jobs in Russia, only to end up on the front lines in Ukraine! Sounds like a comedy sketch, right? But there's more to this story than meets the eye. Dive in and uncover the details behind this surprising turn of events.
abstract_zh: 你知道吗？那些被忽悠到俄罗斯找工作的“秘鲁兄弟”，结果却在乌克兰前线碰了钉子！这事儿听起来是不是就像个滑稽的小品，让人忍俊不禁？但别笑得太早，这背后可是有大新闻等着你哦！来揭开这个谜团吧！
